appStore.title: Whose Toes Are Those?
appStore.description:
Step right up to the silliest baby game show: Whose Toes Are Those?

Can your toddler guess which character is hiding behind the curtain just by looking at their toes?

Each round, kids see a pair of feet and guess who they belong to. It could be a dancing penguin, a cowboy, a tiger, a sasquatch, and more. Choose correctly and the curtain rises with fun music and a silly stage dance. Guess again if you are wrong.

Perfect for toddlers and preschoolers, this endlessly looping guessing game helps build early learning skills like animal recognition, memory, and matching while keeping little ones laughing.

Why parents love it:
• Created by parents and teachers for ages 1 to 4
• Builds attention, recognition, and matching skills
• No ads and no menus for safe and simple play
• Great for car rides, waiting rooms, and quiet time
• Designed for babies, toddlers, and preschoolers

Why kids love it:
• Fun game show atmosphere with surprises
• Cute animals, silly characters, and funny dances
• Positive feedback that encourages guessing
• New characters added regularly

If your child loves peekaboo, baby guessing games, and animal characters, they will love Whose Toes Are Those?

Praise for Whose Toes Are Those:
 "Keeps children laughing while learning… filled with music, dancing, and overall silliness." — KinderTown
 "We absolutely love Whose Toes Are Those!" — Famigo
 "It’s just too cute." — Famigo
